english_name: The Epistle of Paul the Apostle to the Galatians

verses.latin_vulgate: O insensati Galatæ, quis vos fascinavit non obedire veritati, ante quorum oculos Jesus Christus præscriptus est, in vobis crucifixus?
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὦ ἀνόητοι γαλάται τίς ὑμᾶς ἐβάσκανεν τῇ ἀληθείᾳ μὴ πείθεσθαι, οἷς κατ᾽ ὀφθαλμοὺς ἰησοῦς χριστὸς προεγράφη ἐν ὑμῖν ἐσταυρωμένος
verses.king_james: O foolish Galatians, who hath bewitched you, that ye should not obey the truth, before whose eyes Jesus Christ hath been evidently set forth, crucified among you?

verses.latin_vulgate: Hoc solum a vobis volo discere: ex operibus legis Spiritum accepistis, an ex auditu fidei?
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τοῦτο μόνον θέλω μαθεῖν ἀφ᾽ ὑμῶν ἐξ ἔργων νόμου τὸ πνεῦμα ἐλάβετε ἢ ἐξ ἀκοῆς πίστεως
verses.king_james: This only would I learn of you, Received ye the Spirit by the works of the law, or by the hearing of faith?

verses.latin_vulgate: sic stulti estis, ut cum Spiritu cœperitis, nunc carne consummemini?
verses.greek_textus_receptus: οὕτως ἀνόητοί ἐστε ἐναρξάμενοι πνεύματι νῦν σαρκὶ ἐπιτελεῖσθε
verses.king_james: Are ye so foolish? having begun in the Spirit, are ye now made perfect by the flesh?

verses.latin_vulgate: tanta passi estis sine causa? si tamen sine causa.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τοσαῦτα ἐπάθετε εἰκῇ εἴγε καὶ εἰκῇ
verses.king_james: Have ye suffered so many things in vain? if *it be* yet in vain.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui ergo tribuit vobis Spiritum, et operatur virtutes in vobis: ex operibus legis, an ex auditu fidei?
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὁ οὖν ἐπιχορηγῶν ὑμῖν τὸ πνεῦμα καὶ ἐνεργῶν δυνάμεις ἐν ὑμῖν ἐξ ἔργων νόμου ἢ ἐξ ἀκοῆς πίστεως
verses.king_james: He therefore that ministereth to you the Spirit, and worketh miracles among you, *doeth he it* by the works of the law, or by the hearing of faith?

verses.latin_vulgate: Sicut scriptum est: Abraham credidit Deo, et reputatum est illi ad justitiam:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: καθὼς ἀβραὰμ ἐπίστευσεν τῷ θεῷ καὶ ἐλογίσθη αὐτῷ εἰς δικαιοσύνην
verses.king_james: Even as Abraham believed God, and it was accounted to him for righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: cognoscite ergo quia qui ex fide sunt, ii sunt filii Abrahæ.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: γινώσκετε ἄρα ὅτι οἱ ἐκ πίστεως οὗτοι εἰσιν υἱοί ἀβραάμ
verses.king_james: Know ye therefore that they which are of faith, the same are the children of Abraham.

verses.latin_vulgate: Providens autem Scriptura quia ex fide justificat gentes Deus, prænuntiavit Abrahæ: Quia benedicentur in te omnes gentes.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: προϊδοῦσα δὲ ἡ γραφὴ ὅτι ἐκ πίστεως δικαιοῖ τὰ ἔθνη ὁ θεὸς προευηγγελίσατο τῷ ἀβραὰμ ὅτι ἐνευλογηθήσονται ἐν σοὶ πάντα τὰ ἔθνη
verses.king_james: And the scripture, foreseeing that God would justify the heathen through faith, preached before the gospel unto Abraham, *saying*, In thee shall all nations be blessed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur qui ex fide sunt, benedicentur cum fideli Abraham.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὥστε οἱ ἐκ πίστεως εὐλογοῦνται σὺν τῷ πιστῷ ἀβραάμ
verses.king_james: So then they which be of faith are blessed with faithful Abraham.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quicumque enim ex operibus legis sunt, sub maledicto sunt. Scriptum est enim: Maledictus omnis qui non permanserit in omnibus quæ scripta sunt in libro legis ut faciat ea.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὅσοι γὰρ ἐξ ἔργων νόμου εἰσὶν ὑπὸ κατάραν εἰσίν γέγραπται γὰρ ἐπικατάρατος πᾶς ὃς οὐκ ἐμμένει ἐν πᾶσιν τοῖς γεγραμμένοις ἐν τῷ βιβλίῳ τοῦ νόμου τοῦ ποιῆσαι αὐτά
verses.king_james: For as many as are of the works of the law are under the curse: for it is written, Cursed *is* every one that continueth not in all things which are written in the book of the law to do them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam autem in lege nemo justificatur apud Deum, manifestum est: quia justus ex fide vivit.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὅτι δὲ ἐν νόμῳ οὐδεὶς δικαιοῦται παρὰ τῷ θεῷ δῆλον ὅτι ὁ δίκαιος ἐκ πίστεως ζήσεται
verses.king_james: But that no man is justified by the law in the sight of God, *it is* evident: for, The just shall live by faith.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lex autem non est ex fide, sed: Qui fecerit ea, vivet in illis.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὁ δὲ νόμος οὐκ ἔστιν ἐκ πίστεως ἀλλ᾽ ὁ ποιήσας αὐτὰ ἄνθρωπος ζήσεται ἐν αὐτοῖς
verses.king_james: And the law is not of faith: but, The man that doeth them shall live in them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Christus nos redemit de maledicto legis, factus pro nobis maledictum: quia scriptum est: Maledictus omnis qui pendet in ligno:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: χριστὸς ἡμᾶς ἐξηγόρασεν ἐκ τῆς κατάρας τοῦ νόμου γενόμενος ὑπὲρ ἡμῶν κατάρα γέγραπται γὰρ, ἐπικατάρατος πᾶς ὁ κρεμάμενος ἐπὶ ξύλου
verses.king_james: Christ hath redeemed us from the curse of the law, being made a curse for us: for it is written, Cursed *is* every one that hangeth on a tree:

verses.latin_vulgate: ut in gentibus benedictio Abrahæ fieret in Christo Jesu, ut pollicitationem Spiritus accipiamus per fidem.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἵνα εἰς τὰ ἔθνη ἡ εὐλογία τοῦ ἀβραὰμ γένηται ἐν χριστῷ ἰησοῦ ἵνα τὴν ἐπαγγελίαν τοῦ πνεύματος λάβωμεν διὰ τῆς πίστεως
verses.king_james: That the blessing of Abraham might come on the Gentiles through Jesus Christ; that we might receive the promise of the Spirit through faith.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fratres (secundum hominem dico) tamen hominis confirmatum testamentum nemo spernit, aut superordinat.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἀδελφοί κατὰ ἄνθρωπον λέγω ὅμως ἀνθρώπου κεκυρωμένην διαθήκην οὐδεὶς ἀθετεῖ ἢ ἐπιδιατάσσεται
verses.king_james: Brethren, I speak after the manner of men; Though *it be* but a man's covenant, yet *if it be* confirmed, no man disannulleth, or addeth thereto.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abrahæ dictæ sunt promissiones, et semini ejus. Non dicit: Et seminibus, quasi in multis: sed quasi in uno: Et semini tuo, qui est Christus.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τῷ δὲ ἀβραὰμ ἐῤῥήθησαν αἱ ἐπαγγελίαι καὶ τῷ σπέρματι αὐτοῦ οὐ λέγει καὶ τοῖς σπέρμασιν ὡς ἐπὶ πολλῶν ἀλλ᾽ ὡς ἐφ᾽ ἑνός καὶ τῷ σπέρματί σου ὅς ἐστιν χριστός
verses.king_james: Now to Abraham and his seed were the promises made. He saith not, And to seeds, as of many; but as of one, And to thy seed, which is Christ.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hoc autem dico, testamentum confirmatum a Deo: quæ post quadringentos et triginta annos facta est lex, non irritum facit ad evacuandam promissionem.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τοῦτο δὲ λέγω διαθήκην προκεκυρωμένην ὑπὸ τοῦ θεοῦ εἰς χριστὸν ὁ μετὰ ἔτη τετρακόσια καὶ τριάκοντα γεγονὼς νόμος οὐκ ἀκυροῖ εἰς τὸ καταργῆσαι τὴν ἐπαγγελίαν
verses.king_james: And this I say, *that* the covenant, that was confirmed before of God in Christ, the law, which was four hundred and thirty years after, cannot disannul, that it should make the promise of none effect.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nam si ex lege hæreditas, jam non ex promissione. Abrahæ autem per repromissionem donavit Deus.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: εἰ γὰρ ἐκ νόμου ἡ κληρονομία οὐκέτι ἐξ ἐπαγγελίας τῷ δὲ ἀβραὰμ δι᾽ ἐπαγγελίας κεχάρισται ὁ θεός
verses.king_james: For if the inheritance *be* of the law, *it is* no more of promise: but God gave *it* to Abraham by promise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quid igitur lex? Propter transgressiones posita est donec veniret semen, cui promiserat, ordinata per angelos in manu mediatoris.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τί οὖν ὁ νόμος τῶν παραβάσεων χάριν προσετέθη ἄχρις οὗ ἔλθῃ τὸ σπέρμα ᾧ ἐπήγγελται διαταγεὶς δι᾽ ἀγγέλων ἐν χειρὶ μεσίτου
verses.king_james: Wherefore then *serveth* the law? It was added because of transgressions, till the seed should come to whom the promise was made; *and it was* ordained by angels in the hand of a mediator.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mediator autem unius non est: Deus autem unus est.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὁ δὲ μεσίτης ἑνὸς οὐκ ἔστιν ὁ δὲ θεὸς εἷς ἐστιν
verses.king_james: Now a mediator is not *a mediator* of one, but God is one.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lex ergo adversus promissa Dei? Absit. Si enim data esset lex, quæ posset vivificare, vere ex lege esset justitia.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὁ οὖν νόμος κατὰ τῶν ἐπαγγελιῶν τοῦ θεοῦ μὴ γένοιτο εἰ γὰρ ἐδόθη νόμος ὁ δυνάμενος ζῳοποιῆσαι ὄντως ἂν ἐκ νόμου ἦν ἡ δικαιοσύνη
verses.king_james: *Is* the law then against the promises of God? God forbid: for if there had been a law given which could have given life, verily righteousness should have been by the law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed conclusit Scriptura omnia sub peccato, ut promissio ex fide Jesu Christi daretur credentibus.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἀλλὰ συνέκλεισεν ἡ γραφὴ τὰ πάντα ὑπὸ ἁμαρτίαν ἵνα ἡ ἐπαγγελία ἐκ πίστεως ἰησοῦ χριστοῦ δοθῇ τοῖς πιστεύουσιν
verses.king_james: But the scripture hath concluded all under sin, that the promise by faith of Jesus Christ might be given to them that believe.

verses.latin_vulgate: Prius autem quam veniret fides, sub lege custodiebamur conclusi in eam fidem quæ revelanda erat
verses.greek_textus_receptus: πρὸ τοῦ δὲ ἐλθεῖν τὴν πίστιν ὑπὸ νόμον ἐφρουρούμεθα συγκεκλεισμένοι εἰς τὴν μέλλουσαν πίστιν ἀποκαλυφθῆναι
verses.king_james: But before faith came, we were kept under the law, shut up unto the faith which should afterwards be revealed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Itaque lex pædagogus noster fuit in Christo, ut ex fide justificemur.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὥστε ὁ νόμος παιδαγωγὸς ἡμῶν γέγονεν εἰς χριστόν ἵνα ἐκ πίστεως δικαιωθῶμεν
verses.king_james: Wherefore the law was our schoolmaster *to bring us* unto Christ, that we might be justified by faith.

verses.latin_vulgate: At ubi venit fides, jam non sumus sub pædagogo.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἐλθούσης δὲ τῆς πίστεως οὐκέτι ὑπὸ παιδαγωγόν ἐσμεν
verses.king_james: But after that faith is come, we are no longer under a schoolmaster.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes enim filii Dei estis per fidem, quæ est in Christo Jesu.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: πάντες γὰρ υἱοὶ θεοῦ ἐστε διὰ τῆς πίστεως ἐν χριστῷ ἰησοῦ
verses.king_james: For ye are all the children of God by faith in Christ Jesus.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quicumque enim in Christo baptizati estis, Christum induistis.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὅσοι γὰρ εἰς χριστὸν ἐβαπτίσθητε χριστὸν ἐνεδύσασθε
verses.king_james: For as many of you as have been baptized into Christ have put on Christ.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non est Judæus, neque Græcus: non est servus, neque liber: non est masculus, neque femina. Omnes enim vos unum estis in Christo Jesu.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: οὐκ ἔνι ἰουδαῖος οὐδὲ ἕλλην οὐκ ἔνι δοῦλος οὐδὲ ἐλεύθερος οὐκ ἔνι ἄρσεν καὶ θῆλυ πάντες γὰρ ὑμεῖς εἷς ἐστε ἐν χριστῷ ἰησοῦ
verses.king_james: There is neither Jew nor Greek, there is neither bond nor free, there is neither male nor female: for ye are all one in Christ Jesus.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si autem vos Christi, ergo semen Abrahæ estis, secundum promissionem hæredes.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: εἰ δὲ ὑμεῖς χριστοῦ ἄρα τοῦ ἀβραὰμ σπέρμα ἐστέ καὶ κατ᾽ ἐπαγγελίαν κληρονόμοι
verses.king_james: And if ye *be* Christ's, then are ye Abraham's seed, and heirs according to the promise.
